programme.sub-title: New Zealand v South Africa-1st ODI
programme.desc: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage of the first ODI in the three-match series from Hagley Oval in Christchurch, as the visitors' tour continues following a five-match T20 series. South Africa won the last ODI series against their hosts back in October 2023, when they came away with a 2-1 victory at home. The Proteas won the first two games by four and seven wickets respectively, before New Zealand claimed a six-wicket consolation victory in the final game.
